calendar.matters:
Report On Status Of Administration And Petition For Extraordinary Attorneys Fees To Be Paid From Reserve Funds
Off Calendar Jul-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carrie Moulton for Bo Jesperson.

Ms. Moulton stated that they kept a reserve for general administration costs, and that ninety percent of the funds were used to pay the out of state Attorney and various taxes on the out of state properties. The Report on Status of Administration and Petition for Extraordinary Attorney's Fees to Be Paid From Reserve Funds was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera. (Not Reported)
